mapper.select:
select a.*,b.tenant_name,GROUP_CONCAT(c.menu_id) menuIds from sys_role a left join sys_tenant_member b on a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id and b.db_status = 1 left join sys_role_menu c on a.id = c.role_id and c.db_status = 1 where a.db_status != 0
and a.name like concat('%',#{name}, '%')
and a.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and a.is_system = #{isSystem} and DATE_FORMAT(a.create_time,'%Y-%m-%d') between #{startTime} and #{endTime} and a.remark like concat('%',#{remark},'%') and b.tenant_name like concat('%',#{tenantName},'%') group by a.id order by a.create_time desc
